assets.name: HAS Local Runtime - Loopback
assets.intended_use: Primary live HAS/HASF local control plane, PERT API, Moonshot UI, telemetry refresh, browser QA verification.

assets.name: HAS Local Runtime - LAN
assets.intended_use: LAN-visible HAS/HASF runtime if Uvicorn is bound to 0.0.0.0. Currently expected to fail if server is bound only to 127.0.0.1.

assets.name: Michael iPhone Operator Monitor
assets.intended_use: Operator monitor only. Not a HAS compute node.

assets.name: hoch-relay-001
assets.intended_use: Tailscale relay endpoint and command server. Access is gated via SSH key authentication on port 22, and public port 3012 is kept strictly closed/unreachable.
